title: [CI:DOCS] docs: Fix links to Containerfile and containerignore
body:
The documentation files for `Containerfile` and `containerignore` have been moved from the `buildah` repository to the `common` repository.

ref: https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/488e8654ea
